description.value:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.5qytyTu9CGh01fCN]{Shoanti War Paint (White)} — one application, lasting 1 hour. You can benefit from only one color of Shoanti war paint at a time; applying a different color replaces this effect.

You gain a +2 item bonus to all saving throws against spells with the negative (void) trait. In addition, anytime you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition, reduce its value by 1; the white war paint absorbs the energy and fades away, ending this effect immediately (remove it by hand — the absorption is once, then gone).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
